chapter_title: Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
text:
If a majority of the votes cast at the election favor the proposition:

(1) the governing body shall declare that result on canvassing the election returns; and

(2) the franchise takes effect according to its terms.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 6
### Chapter 311. Gen. Provisions Relating to Mun. Streets
##### § 311.077 — Effective Date of Franchise

If a majority of the votes cast at the election favor the proposition:

    (1) the governing body shall declare that result on canvassing the election returns; and

    (2) the franchise takes effect according to its terms.

*Acts 1995, 74th Leg., ch. 165, Sec. 1, eff. Sept. 1, 1995.*

subsections.text: If a majority of the votes cast at the election favor the proposition:
the governing body shall declare that result on canvassing the election returns; and
the franchise takes effect according to its terms.
